title: Historical Violin Trade Datasets: Caressa & Français Ledger (1918–1943)
description: Structured and cross-referenced dataset derived from archival business ledgers of the Lupot–Gand–Bernardel–Caressa–Français firm (Musée de la musique, Paris). The dataset covers violin transactions recorded between 1918 and 1943 and includes transcription, normalization, and record linkage across purchase/resale and export registers.

resources.name: caressa_francais_ledgers_1918_1943
resources.description: Transcribed and normalized violin ledger dataset derived from the Lupot–Gand–Bernardel–Caressa–Français archival registers (E.981.8.29 Purchase/Resale Register and E.981.8.30 Export Journal). Includes cross-referenced entries between purchase, resale, and export records covering 1918–1943.
